attributes.additional_details: To enable people to broaden communication skills and to allow people of all ages background to communicate with the deaf community
attributes.background: Pass a new law to make british sign language madotory skills to be taught in schools

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Require schools to teach British Sign Language from Key Stage 2 & at GCSE
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/754981
